questions.question: Which test compares the means of two independent groups?
questions.explanation: An independent t-test compares the means of two separate groups.

questions.question: In plain language, what does a p-value represent?
correctAnswer: probability of observing results if the null is true
likelihood of data under the null hypothesis
questions.explanation: A p-value measures how surprising your data is assuming the null hypothesis is true.

questions.question: A correlation of -0.8 indicates:
questions.explanation: Negative correlation means as one variable increases, the other decreases.
